h27a6a924g08e6g488fgb2beg7e90ed095bda: Arabella is back and the druids have stopped their warbling. The day just got a lot brighter - thanks to you.
ha0e104c6g8169g4a5aga944g2d4b73e69879: Because of you, we can leave on our own terms. That'll make all the difference on the road ahead.
h3650c9fag3529g4669g85a2g958b9093a346: Because of you, I got my llittle girl back. That's not something I'll forget.
hc1fb3510g97f3g40bcgbc37geccb72bc5e4a: I'm not letting Bells out of my sight. Should the druids try anything again... well, Kelemvor is going to be busy.
hfa884866g28a7g4d22ga030gda565ab61d92: You bastard - you lied to me. You said Arabella was all right!
h2c7c893bg671ag44caga08eg4d44e3236f58: Everyone else is licking your boots but some advice? Stay the hells away from me - unless you fancy meeting Kelemvor.
h9a2500ceg7286g4914g8506g3d11ca0e4c2f: And then you kill that snake Kagha? I don't know whose side you're on, but stay the hells away from me.
h831cad10g06a6g41b3g87b8ge453e0eb6106: You have any sense? You and that snake Kagha will sleep with one eye open.
h9e0af2f4gb97cg4b3ega445g2d85c589ba81: My little girl is dead. You were there! Why didn't you stop it?
he8152fd6g91b2g4940gbfbeg3ae7a480b615: You bastard. Get away! GET AWAY FROM ME!
h21eb2314g8331g4e07gba3fg5cf3d7920297: The ritual is stopped. That's all Arabella wanted. That's what she tried so hard to do. Please - leave me.
